productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Skate Slip-On Casual Shoes
description: lotto shoes - the one stop shop for quality footwear with optimal durability. This Skate slip-on shoe with its laceless styling and padded inner is sure to become a closet favourite. Referenced from the skate and surf culture, but crafted for all comfort junkies, style this sockless with shorts; it's a perfect slip-on when you're in a hurry! Upper Synthetic upper with syntheticc overlays Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Slip on style Padded tongue with branding Padded fabric inner Midsole Rubber midsole for impact protection Outsole Herringbone and waffle patterned grooves on the outsole for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
